mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flow_approve_record (flow_apply_id, approver_id, action, comment, approved_at) VALUES (#{flowApplyId}, #{approverId}, #{action}, #{comment}, COALESCE(#{approvedAt}, NOW()))
mapper.select: SELECT far.id, far.approver_id AS approverId, COALESCE(su.real_name, su.username) AS approverName, far.action, far.comment, far.approved_at AS approvedAt FROM flow_approve_record far LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON far.approver_id = su.id WHERE far.flow_apply_id = #{flowApplyId} ORDER BY far.approved_at ASC
